evidence_gaps: No OpenAlex results returned; cross-domain (high-energy physics, gravitational waves, network coding) arxiv entries were filtered as false positives, leaving no arxiv papers on underwater acoustic target recognition itself.
No ShipsEar, DeepShip, or WhaleFM-style dataset card appeared in raw output; only SonAIr dataset repo is confirmed, so dataset coverage is thin.
No survey or benchmark paper on underwater acoustic ML classification was retrieved; consider manually searching IEEE Xplore / JASA for a recent review.
Classical ML baselines (SVM, Random Forest on hand-crafted features) were not surfaced by the backends; student must locate them via Google Scholar / IEEE.
